behavior_summary: This script implements the Daemos NPC surface handlers by delegating all significant behavior to shared sorcerer and spell-combat routines.
U8P_DAEMOS::look responds to player 'U8P_DAEMOS::look' / examine by calling the sorcerer U8P_DAEMOS::look handler and then suspending.
U8P_DAEMOS::use is a thin wrapper that forwards 'U8P_DAEMOS::use' interactions to a sorcerer U8P_DAEMOS::use handler and then suspends.
U8P_DAEMOS::enterFastArea and U8P_DAEMOS::leaveFastArea are proximity trigger handlers that call SORCERER routines to detect the player and reset sorcerer activity respectively.
U8P_DAEMOS::cast forwards its single uword parameter to the combat spell loop (SPELCMBT::combatSpellLoop) to run spell-casting behavior.
notable_control_flow: Each process function delegates to an external engine/shared routine then immediately suspends, indicating the script hands off behavior and does not implement long-running logic itself.

U8P_DAEMOS::enterFastArea acts as an entry trigger for proximity-based AI engagement via SORCERER::sorcererDetectPlayer; U8P_DAEMOS::leaveFastArea does the inverse via SORCERER::sorcererResetActivity.
U8P_DAEMOS::cast runs the combat spell loop (delegation to SPELCMBT) with the provided parameter and then yields — the parameter-driven dispatch models spell selection at runtime.
open_questions: What concrete spell identifiers map to the uword parameter passed to U8P_DAEMOS::cast (game data required)?
Do the SORCERER::* routines invoked perform additional state writes or global-flag changes not visible in this script?
Is there any context-specific data (owner, faction, equipment) that the shared sorcerer handlers read which would affect Daemos' behavior?

main_function.name: U8P_DAEMOS::look
main_function.purpose: Handle player 'U8P_DAEMOS::look' / examine action for Daemos by delegating to the shared sorcerer U8P_DAEMOS::look handler (produces the NPC's inspect/description behavior).
entry_conditions: Triggered when the player examines or 'looks at' the Daemos NPC (engine 'U8P_DAEMOS::look' / inspect event).

function_map.name: U8P_DAEMOS::look
function_map.role: Respond to player examine/U8P_DAEMOS::look; delegates to SORCERER::func039C

function_map.name: U8P_DAEMOS::use
function_map.role: Handle player 'U8P_DAEMOS::use' interaction; delegates to SORCERER::func05EC

function_map.name: U8P_DAEMOS::enterFastArea
function_map.role: Proximity enter trigger; calls SORCERER::sorcererDetectPlayer to start engagement/AI

function_map.name: U8P_DAEMOS::leaveFastArea
function_map.role: Proximity exit trigger; calls SORCERER::sorcererResetActivity to stop/reset AI activity

function_map.name: U8P_DAEMOS::cast
function_map.role: Spell-casting wrapper that forwards a uword parameter to SPELCMBT::combatSpellLoop

function_map.name: SORCERER::func039C
function_map.role: Shared sorcerer routine providing U8P_DAEMOS::look/inspect behavior

function_map.name: SORCERER::sorcererDetectPlayer
function_map.role: Shared detection/engagement routine invoked on fast-area entry

function_map.name: SORCERER::sorcererResetActivity
function_map.role: Shared routine to reset/stop sorcerer activity invoked on fast-area exit

function_map.name: SPELCMBT::combatSpellLoop
function_map.role: Combat spell loop executed by U8P_DAEMOS::cast to run spell behavior for a given id

external_calls.purpose: Produce the NPC's U8P_DAEMOS::look/examine response by using shared sorcerer logic
Handle a 'U8P_DAEMOS::use' interaction via shared sorcerer handler
Detect player entering proximity and initiate sorcerer AI/engagement
Reset or clear sorcerer activity/state when the player leaves proximity
Execute the combat spell-casting loop for the provided uword (likely a spell id)

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script implements the Daemos NPC surface handlers by delegating all significant behavior to shared sorcerer and spell-combat routines.
